---
title: "Hana's E-portfolio"
author: "Tsyr-Rau (Hana) Chen"
date: "MAY 2026"
format:
  html:
    theme: journal
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---

# Hi, I'm Hana Chen 

<center>

![](S__42655761.jpg){width=400}

</center>

I'm a data-driven professional passionate about **marketing strategy**, **data analytics**, and **business innovation**. Currently pursuing my Master's in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University while completing my MBA at National Taipei University.

## What I Do

🎯 **Data Analysis & Visualization** - Transform complex datasets into actionable insights using Excel, Python, and SQL

📊 **Marketing Strategy** - Develop data-driven campaigns that drive engagement and growth

💼 **Project Management** - Lead cross-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions

## Recent Highlights

- **9,000+ Social Media Followers** - Grew from zero through strategic content creation
- **Excel & SQL Expertise** - Analyzed survey data and delivery metrics for business insights
- **Award Winner** - Received recognition at Taiwan Original X Award 2025 and OTOP Marketing Competition

## Featured Projects

### 🍺 Brewery Marketing & Business Strategy
Developed comprehensive marketing strategy and business plan for launching a brewery in Boston, including positioning analysis and sustainable promotional campaigns.

### 📦 Delivery Time Analysis for Food Delivery Platforms
Used SQL to analyze delivery factors and produced insights combining technical analysis with practical business recommendations.

### 🤖 Generative AI Food Waste Reduction App
Co-developed mobile app prototype using generative AI to solve real-world sustainability challenges.

## Skills at a Glance

**Data Analysis:** Excel | Python | SQL | PowerPoint | Canva

**Languages:** English (Proficient, Duolingo 120) | Mandarin (Native)

**Certifications:** Python Developer | SQL | RAG Agents with LLMs | Generative AI with Diffusion Models

---

## Let's Connect! 📬

📧 [hhanaz0903@gmail.com](mailto:hhanaz0903@gmail.com)

📱 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tsyr-rau-chen-hana/?locale=en-US)

📍 Boston, MA | 857-540-9193
